scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build:cloud: ANDROID_API_MODE=cloud npm run build && ANDROID_API_MODE=cloud node scripts/check_android_api_url.mjs && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build:local: ANDROID_API_MODE=local VITE_ALLOW_LOCAL_HTTP=true npm run build && ANDROID_API_MODE=local VITE_ALLOW_LOCAL_HTTP=true node scripts/check_android_api_url.mjs && VITE_ALLOW_LOCAL_HTTP=true npx cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:build:cloud && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:debug: npm run android:build:cloud && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:local: npm run android:build:local && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug -PallowCleartext
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run android:build:cloud && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
